description: Configure the Jitsi Meet deployment to enforce High Definition (720p) video by default. The server-side web configuration must have 'resolution' set to 720, 'startBitrate' set to '4000', and the 'constraints' object configured to request 720p video height (ideal, min, and max). Ensure these settings are applied and active in the 'HDTestRoom' session. Save the served configuration file to ~/served_config.js.
